items.content_html: Obsidian.md plugin to integrate OpenGist and Github Gist snippets into your notes.
items.title: Aetherinox/obsidian-gistr: Obsidian.md plugin to integrate OpenGist and Github Gist snippets into your notes.

items.content_html: Text generator is a handy plugin for Obsidian that helps you generate text content using GPT-3 (OpenAI).
items.title: nhaouari/obsidian-textgenerator-plugin: Text generator is a handy plugin for Obsidian that helps you generate text content using GPT-3 (OpenAI).

items.content_html: This is an Obsidian plugin which can insert a date at the cursor position using a calendar.
items.title: namikaze-40p/obsidian-date-inserter: This is an Obsidian plugin which can insert a date at the cursor position using a calendar.

items.content_html: Obsidian Plugin for social-scientific Qualitative Data Analysis (QDA). An open alternative to MAXQDA and atlas.ti, using Markdown to store data and research codes.
items.title: chrisgrieser/obsidian-quadro: Obsidian Plugin for social-scientific Qualitative Data Analysis (QDA). An open alternative to MAXQDA and atlas.ti, using Markdown to store data and research codes.

items.content_html: An Obsidian.md plugin randomly exposing you to your cards. Supports habits, to-dos, spaced repetition flashcards, iterative reading and more.
items.title: koljapluemer/obsidian-the-queue: An Obsidian.md plugin randomly exposing you to your cards. Supports habits, to-dos, spaced repetition flashcards, iterative reading and more.

items.content_html: An Obsidian plugin to make working with tasks a pleasure (hopefully anyway).
items.title: roovo/obsidian-card-board: An Obsidian plugin to make working with tasks a pleasure (hopefully anyway).

items.content_html: This is a plugin for Obsidian (https://obsidian.md). Allows you to create various global settings profiles. You can sync them between different vaults. To keep all your settings in sync, you'll never have to manually adjust them again for every vault you have or create in the future.
items.title: 4Source/settings-profiles-obsidian-plugin: This is a plugin for Obsidian (https://obsidian.md). Allows you to create various global settings profiles. You can sync them between different vaults. To keep all your settings in sync, you'll never have to manually adjust them again for every vault you have or create in the future.

items.title: obsidianmd/obsidian-releases: Community plugins list, theme list, and releases of Obsidian.

items.content_html: Github Publisher helps you to publish your notes on a preconfigured GitHub repository from your Obsidian Vault, for free, and more!

items.content_html: Yet another unofficial Obsidian plugin allowing users to synchronize notes between local device and the cloud service. Supports S3, Dropbox, OneDrive, webdav.
items.title: remotely-save/remotely-save: Yet another unofficial Obsidian plugin allowing users to synchronize notes between local device and the cloud service. Supports S3, Dropbox, OneDrive, webdav.

items.content_html: This is a plugin to the Obsidian software which adds a quick amendment to a user's note to their configured Jira instance for references to jira and internal info pages
items.title: srz2/obsidian-jira-linker: This is a plugin to the Obsidian software which adds a quick amendment to a user's note to their configured Jira instance for references to jira and internal info pages

items.content_html: An Obsidian plugin that shows all open leaves in a tab group as a continuous document (sometimes called "Scrivenings mode"). Features arrow navigation between leaves, reorder leaves with drag-and-drop of tab headers.
items.title: gasparschott/obsidian-continuous-mode: An Obsidian plugin that shows all open leaves in a tab group as a continuous document (sometimes called "Scrivenings mode"). Features arrow navigation between leaves, reorder leaves with drag-and-drop of tab headers.

items.content_html: An Obsidian plugin that allows for automatic importing and linking of scripture verses and other paragraphs such as those from a conference talk.
items.title: kkartch0/obsidian-gospel-study: An Obsidian plugin that allows for automatic importing and linking of scripture verses and other paragraphs such as those from a conference talk.
